dk-build.description: Build Docker image from current directory

dk-run.description: Run container interactively with port mapping

dk-ps.description: List all containers with formatted output

dk-clean.command: docker system prune -af && docker volume prune -f
dk-clean.description: Clean up all unused Docker resources

dk-compose-up.description: Build and start compose stack in background

dk-compose-down.description: Stop and remove compose stack with volumes
